headline: Jim Cramer on Walmart: “It Bounced Off the Roof, Came Back Down, and It’s Ready to Run”
summary: Walmart Inc. (NASDAQ:WMT) is included in Mad Money’s latest recap as Jim Cramer outlined his strategy for market sell-offs. A caller asked if the stock works as a “safety trade” in the current environment, and Cramer replied: I absolutely think that Walmart is okay here. I like the stock very much. I think it just […]

headline: Why Celsius (CELH) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of energy drink company Celsius (NASDAQ:CELH) jumped 4.5% in the afternoon session after the stock's positive momentum continued as Deutsche Bank upgraded the stock to Buy from Hold, citing the recent sharp selloff as a compelling entry point.

headline: GEN Restaurant Group Inc (GENK) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Expansion and Challenges Amid ...
summary: Despite opening new locations and entering the consumer packaged goods market, GEN Restaurant Group Inc (GENK) faces financial hurdles with declining same-store sales and increased costs.
